name: Scilex Holding Co
business: Scilex Holding Co is a revenue-generating company focused on acquiring, developing, and commercializing non-opioid pain management products for acute and chronic pain. Its commercial products include ZTlido (lidocaine topical system) for postherpetic neuralgia, ELYXYB (oral solution) for acute migraine, and GLOPERBA (oral solution) for gout prophylaxis. The company also has three product candidates: SEMDEXA (epidural injection for sciatica), SP-103 (high-dose lidocaine topical for acute pain), and SP-104 (low-dose naltrexone for fibromyalgia).
sellsTo: Healthcare providers (primary care physicians, pain specialists, neurologists, palliative care physicians)
namedCustomers: Medicaid in California, Florida, Idaho, and North Dakota

exposures.sentence: We are an innovative revenue-generating company focused on acquiring, developing and commercializing non-opioid pain management products for the treatment of acute and chronic pain.
We have adopted a cryptocurrency treasury strategy in which we intend to invest in bitcoin, Ethereum and other blockchain-linked cryptocurrencies.

catalysts.event: Initiation of second Phase 3 study for SEMDEXA
catalysts.sentence: We initiated the second Phase 3 study in September 2025.

catalysts.event: Approval of ELYXYB by Health Canada
catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we received approval from Health Canada’s Pharmaceutical Drugs Directorate, Bureau of Cardiology, Allergy and Neurological Sciences for ELYXYB for the acute treatment of migraine with or without aura in Canada.

We anticipate that our current supply of sodium hyaluronate will be sufficient to satisfy our clinical and commercial supply requirements for sodium hyaluronate for at least 12 months following our expected commercial launch of SP-102 in 2027.

catalysts.event: Completion of pivotal Phase 3 study for SEMDEXA
catalysts.sentence: We have completed a pivotal Phase 3 study with final results received in March 2022, which results reflected achievement of primary and secondary endpoints.

tamClaims.claim: Over 4.8 million patients suffer from sciatica in the United States (2024 estimate).
tamClaims.sentence: According to a report by Decision Resources Group, it was estimated that over 4.8 million patients would suffer from sciatica in the United States in 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Over 3.5 million people living with PHN conditions in the United States in 2021.
tamClaims.sentence: According to Evaluate Ltd., there were over 3.5 million people living with PHN conditions in the United States in 2021.

tamClaims.claim: More than 206 million prescription lidocaine patches sold in the United States in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, there were more than 206 million prescription lidocaine patches sold in the United States, according to Symphony Healthcare.

tamClaims.claim: Over 12 million epidural steroid injections administered annually in the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: SEMDEXA has been granted fast track designation by the FDA and, if approved, could become the first FDA-approved alternative to off-label epidural steroid injections, which are administered over 12 million times annually in the United States.
